column1: # Beckhoff EL7221-9014 — 1-channel compact servo drive terminal.
#   - Permanent-magnet 3-phase synchronous motor drive, direct motor cable.
#   - OCT (One Cable Technology) — motor phases + absolute feedback in one cable.
#   - Supply: 24 V DC electronics (E-bus), 8..48 V DC motor stage (external).
#   - 8 A RMS continuous (≤45 °C), 16 A peak for 1 s.
#   - 2× end-position inputs, 1× STO input, 1× motor-brake output.
#   - Dual profile support: MDP 742 (Beckhoff-native, objects in 0x6000/0x7010)
#     miniOS uses the DS402 profile — same CSP pipeline as the ClearPath-EC.
#   - Supports DC-Sync with `AssignActivate = 0x0700` (bit 8 set means Sync0
#     with shift-time enabled, per ETG.1020). ClearPath uses 0x0300 — the
#     EL7221 wants the shift bit on because the OCT feedback deserialisation
#     adds a known latency the master compensates for.
#   - Mailbox: SdoInfo / PdoAssign / CompleteAccess / DiagHistory + FoE
#     (firmware update supported; out of scope for miniOS today).
# Minimum PDO mapping for CSP (the CiA-402 DS402 pair on this terminal):
#   These fit the default 6-byte Outputs SM + 10-byte Inputs SM with room
#   for the Beckhoff-native profile-status / touch-probe fields if enabled.
# Interpolation time period must match master cycle. 250 µs = 25×10⁻⁵.
# Mode of operation: CSP (0x08). The EL7221 walks the CiA-402 FSA like any
# standard DS402 drive once 0x6060 is set.
# Max motor torque / current limit. 1000 = 100.0 % of rated (0x6072 is permille).
# Beckhoff amplifier / motor tuning lives in 0x8010/0x8011/0x8014 — those are
# OCT-auto-detected from the motor's electronic nameplate at PreOp, so we
# don't need to push them here. Leaving commented as documentation:
#   0x8010 DRV Amplifier Settings       (max current, frequency, etc.)
#   0x8011 DRV Motor Settings           (pole pairs, Kt, rated speed — from OCT)
#   0x8012 DRV Feature Settings         (0x8012:08 = 1 selects DS402 profile)
#   0x8014 DRV Motor Controller Gains   (Kp/Ki for the current/vel/pos loops)
#   0x80E0 FB Settings                   (feedback source = OCT by default)
# Feature select: switch the PDO profile to DS402 (CiA-402) rather than

column8: Max motor speed (rpm; 0 = use motor nameplate)

column1: # OCT-specific feedback descriptors (populated by the drive at PreOp from
# the motor's OCT electronic nameplate; 0 = not yet resolved).
